active.title: Beesly
active.subtitle: Personal AI Assistant
active.description: Discord-native AI assistant with infra awareness, memory, and skills. Ask Beesly about pod health, disk usage, or your calendar — all from one interface.

upcoming.title: PiKVM
upcoming.subtitle: KVM-over-IP
upcoming.description: Out-of-band remote access for every node — keyboard, video, mouse over the network. Browser-based recovery regardless of OS state, BIOS access, virtual media.

upcoming.title: CPU Upgrade
upcoming.subtitle: k3s node hardware refresh
upcoming.description: Replacing i5-4570T (35W TDP, 4c/4t) with Xeon E3-1230L v3 (25W TDP, 4c/8t) across all three ThinkCentre M93p nodes. Lower TDP, hyperthreading, better performance-per-watt.

planned.title: Canvas
planned.subtitle: Visual Project Board
planned.description: Self-hosted freeform project board. Notes, tasks, images, links, and checklists on a spatial canvas. Built for planning and tracking creative projects.
